title: AGRICULTURAL AND FARMING SUPPORT - 211info
text: OREGON ROHINGYA MYANMAR MUSLIM SOCIETY AGRICULTURAL AND FARMING SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides agricultural and farming support to help community members engage in sustainable farming practices and improve their livelihoods. This support includes connecting individuals to local agricultural resources, providing guidance on farming techniques, and offering assistance in starting small-scale farming or gardening projects. Also helps community members access training and tools necessary for success in Oregon's agricultural environment, fostering economic stability and self-sufficiency. 2410 SE 121st Avenue Suite #208 Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Must meet one of the following: -Immigrants, refugees, and asylum seekers -Low-income individuals and families residing in Oregon -Individuals with limited English proficiency -Families experiencing hardship, displacement, or housing instability -Youth, adults, and elders across all ages -BIPOC (Black, Indigenous, Persons of Color) -Rohingya and Myanmar Community Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 489-5179 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 489-5179 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment, visit website, or walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Burmese, Rohingya, Bangali, Karen, Kachin, Zomi, Chin, Hakka Chin, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Business Development * Agricultural Issues Gardening/Landscaping Instruction Home Gardening Assistance/Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT SERVICES LEGAL SERVICES - LEGAL SERVICE SUPPORT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CULTURAL ADJUSTMENT SUPPORT SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - YOUTH PROGRAM SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON ROHINGYA MYANMAR MUSLIM SOCIETY
